name: Onion and Prosciutto Tart
recipeIngredient: 12 large black olives in oil, pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in oil with herbs until onions are transparent.
2. Add prosciutto and cook for 3 minutes. Season with pepper and check salt.
3. Chill.
4. Roll out dough into a rectangle 11" by 9".
5. Cut 4 strips of dough to make the borders and press them on the edges of rectangle.
6. Transfer to cookie sheet and baste edges with beaten egg.
7. Chill for 1/2 hour.
8. Pre-heat oven to 425.
9. Spread onion mixture on prepared dough.
10. Bake for 30 minutes. Reduce heat to 300, decorate tart with sliced olives and continue baking another 15 minutes.
